---
title: ""
title-block-style: none
format: html
css: styles.css
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .hero-top {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 2rem;
    padding: 3rem 0 2rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #e8ddd5;
  }

  .profile-img {
    width: 200px;
    height: 200px;
    object-fit: cover;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 4px solid #e8c9b8;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    image-rendering: -webkit-optimize-contrast;
    transform: translateZ(0);
  }

  .hero-name {
    font-size: 2.2rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #3d2e28;
    margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
  }

  .hero-tagline {
    font-size: 1rem;
    color: #c1714f;
    font-style: italic;
    margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
  }

  .hero-links {
    display: flex;
    gap: 1.2rem;
  }

  .hero-links a {
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #c1714f;
    text-decoration: none;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }

  .hero-links a::before {
    content: '→ ';
  }

  .hero-links a:hover {
    color: #a05a3a;
    text-decoration: underline;
  }

  .hero-bottom {
    padding: 1.75rem 0 2.5rem;
    max-width: 100%;
  }

  .hero-divider {
    width: 36px;
    height: 2px;
    background: #e8c9b8;
    border-radius: 2px;
    margin-bottom: 1.1rem;
  }

  .hero-bio {
    font-size: 1rem;
    color: #7a6458;
    line-height: 1.85;
    max-width: 780px;
  }
</style>

<div class="hero-top">
  <img class="profile-img"
       src="images/Abbey_headshot.jpg"
       alt="Abbey Kealey"/>
  <div class="hero-top-text">
    <div class="hero-name">Abbey Kealey</div>
    <div class="hero-tagline">MGEM Student · UBC</div>
    <div class="hero-links">
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/abbey-kealey-405473204/">LinkedIn</a>
      <a href="mailto:abbeykealey@gmail.com">Email</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="hero-bottom">
  <div class="hero-divider"></div>
  <p class="hero-bio">Welcome to my e-portfolio! I'm Abbey, a graduate student at UBC completing my Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management. With a background in environmental and computer science, I'm interested in how technology and spatial data can help us understand and care for the natural world. This portfolio documents where that interest has taken me throughout my degree. I hope you enjoy exploring it!</p>
</div>
```
